Related Entities

  • hospital MAINE GENERAL MEDICAL CENTER 4-star overall rating
  • hospital TOGUS VA MEDICAL CENTER 4-star overall rating
  • hospital RIVERVIEW PSYCHIATRIC CENTER
  • snf MAINEGENERAL REHAB & LONG TERM CARE - GRAY BIRCH 4-star, 77 beds
  • snf AUGUSTA CENTER FOR HEALTH & REHABILITATION, LLC 4-star, 72 beds
  • snf OAK GROVE CENTER 1-star, 90 beds
  • snf WATERVILLE CENTER FOR HEALTH AND REHAB 1-star, 111 beds
  • snf MAINE VETERANS HOME - AUGUSTA 5-star, 108 beds
  • snf Lakewood A Continuing Care Center 2-star, 105 beds
  • snf MAINEGENERAL REHAB & LONG TERM CARE - GLENRIDGE 5-star, 125 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
